text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Accra Institute of Technology is listed under Ghana.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [Accra Institute of Technology](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Accra_Institute_of_Technology \"Accra Institute of Technology\")","entailment":"The bullet point showing Accra Institute of Technology appears in the list of institutions under the Ghana heading, indicating it is a Ghanaian university.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Omar Bongo University is listed under Gabon.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [Omar Bongo University](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Omar_Bongo_University \"Omar Bongo University\")","entailment":"The bullet point for Omar Bongo University appears in the row labeled with the Gabon flag, showing it is associated with Gabon.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"African Virtual University is listed under Kenya.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [African Virtual University](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/African_Virtual_University \"African Virtual University\")","entailment":"The bullet point for African Virtual University is included in the list of institutions under the Kenya heading, indicating it is a Kenyan university.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"}]}
